SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.ds

Interface Collection<T>

All Superinterfaces:
Higher<Collection.µ,T>, Iterable<T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
Array<T>, Deque<T>, Either<A,B>, HashMap<K,V>, LazyList<T>, List<T>, Maybe<T>, PriorityQueue<T>, Queue<T>, RoseTree<T>, Set<T>, Set.AVLTree<T>, Stack<T>, Validation<E,T>, Vector<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
Array.NonEmpty, Deque.BankersDeque, Either.Left, Either.Right, HashMap.HAMT, LazyList.Empty, LazyList.NonEmpty, List.EmptyList, List.LinkedList, Maybe.Nothing, Maybe.Some, PriorityQueue.LeftistHeap, Queue.BankersQueue, RoseTree.RoseTreeImpl, Set.Empty, Set.NonEmpty, Stack.StackImpl, Validation.Invalid, Validation.Valid, Vector.VectorImpl
public interface Collection<T> extends Higher<Collection.µ,T>, Iterable<T>
The root interface for all purely functional polymorphic collections.
